response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse technical background, but her experience with C++ and industrial automation is limited compared to the role's requirements. Her open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling are notable, but the role's emphasis on C++, secure engineering, and industrial cybersecurity may not align perfectly with her recent work.
strengths: Extensive experience with full-stack development and modern software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, agile).
Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and developer tooling, showcasing architectural and collaborative skills.
Strong problem-solving and mentorship abilities, evidenced by workshops and talks on testing and functional programming.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
Lacks direct experience with industrial automation, cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), or message-broker-based architectures.
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which are not core to this role.
